query: Fossavatnsgangan cross country ski race Isafjordur

videos.title: Fossavatn Ísafjorður 2019
videos.description: the snow was already gone in April which was actually unusual for that region, so they brought it  on big trucks from top parts of the fiords where it was still available :D

videos.title: Toni Livers leading in Fossavatn Ski Marathon 2013
SkiPlanet by Worldloppet Episode 8 at Fossavatnsgangan
videos.description:
💥ON AIR💥
Welcome to the 8th episode of #SkiPlanetByWorldloppet, your worldwide cross-country marathon skiing show!
Today, we’re in Ísafjörður, in Iceland, to discover the great Fossavatnsgangan... and many more! Enjoy the show!

👍 Don't miss this episode AND like the #Worldloppet Facebook-page for not missing a single episode of #SkiPlanet!

• SKI PLANET is hosted by Marika Godin, produced by Worldloppet and proudly presented by Montagnes du Jura and Rossignol & Rossignol Apparel.

Mizenboite Production • Nansen Développement • Annette Lamy Chappuis
Dokkan brugghús • Amazing Westfjords • Gamla Bakaríið • @grimur finnbogason • Við Pollinn - Hótel Ísafjörður

videos.title: Iceland Travel Vlog - Skiing Trip to Isafjordur (Blue Lagoon, Black Sand Beach, hot springs...)
videos.description:
Welcome to another episode of Gunnar's Nordic Adventures! This time you will follow me to the land of Ice and Fire! Welcome to (N)Iceland! The home of Fossavatnsgangan - one of the most prestigious cross-country skiing races in the world. 

Together with my brothers I have spent 7 days in Iceland with the full program: 

⚫🏖🌊 Black Sand Beach (Reynisfjara) 
🌄 Reykjadalur Olfuss (bathing in a natural hot spring)
🔵🛀 Blue Lagoon (natural spa)
🎣 Fishing in the Isafjord
🏍❄ Snowmobiling 
✨ Fossavatnsgangan Night Race 35km 
🪡🖋 Getting a tattoo

The Fossavatnsgangan is Icelands biggest xc-ski race. It is member of the Worldloppet Ski Federation: https://fossavatn.is/

Check out the Blue Lagoon: https://www.bluelagoon.com/day-visit/the-blue-lagoon

Thanks go to: 
🤙 Bobbi and the Fossavatnsgangan Team for organizing the whole trip
😎 Northug Sportswear which kept me warm and dry under all weather conditions.  👉 sign up, for our Newsletter to receive a 20 % discount for the Northug webshop. 

❗️👍 https://www.worldloppet.com/newsletter/

videos.title: Trip to Iceland - Nordic Skiing, Waterfalls, Hot Springs and Volcanos
videos.description:
On our trip to Iceland and the Cross Country Skiing race in Isafjordur we got to see a lot of impressive scenery and did a lot of fun things, here's is parts of what we experienced during this trip. I hope you like it!

I have recorded this video using:
iPhone 6s
GoPro Session 5, with gimbal: Feiyu-Tech FY-WGS 3-axis
Sony Wifi Lens, DSC-QX10
DJI Phantom 3 4k

videos.title: Worldloppet Race Reporter Philipp at the Fossavatnsgangan 2019
videos.description: Our race reporter visited the final race of the Worldloppet season 2019 in order to finish his 10th Worldloppet race and become a Worldloppet Master!
videos.transcript:

[Applause]

videos.title: Best Moments of Fossavatnsgangan 2023
videos.description:
The Ski Classics Challengers event Fossavatnsgangan took place last weekend with a 50km long-distance race in classic technique in Ísafjördur, Iceland. 

Now you can enjoy the event highlights!

Video Credits: Haraldsson Prod. Ehf/Fossavatnsgangan

videos.title: Fossavatn Cross Country Ski Marathon, Iceland
videos.description: Fossavatn Cross-country Ski Marathon joined "World Loppet" in 2015. Experience this spectacular event in a land of fire and ice.
